title: Potions: Rebrewed
description: Enhances potion visuals with distinct bottle shapes for different potion types, and new lingering potion textures.
body:
# Potions: Rebrewed
*Introduces refined textures for all potion variants with distinct visual cues for different types, creating a more intuitive brewing experience. Lingering potion textures were entirely reworked to better match splash potions while remanining unique.*

## Features
  - Widened bottles for level 2 potions for easy identification
  - Taller, elongated bottles for extended duration potions
  - Completely redesigned lingering potion bottles with unique aesthetic
  - Perfectly aligned all potion textures to the GUI bottom

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
